top_signals.title: Stock Rally Builds on Iran Optimism, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks extended gains and oil fell after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising expectations for a diplomatic end to the conflict that’s triggered price swings across financial markets for more than 100 days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korea’s Kospi Surges as Iran Deal Hopes Lift Chip Stocks
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks surged as investors piled back into the country’s hot chipmakers after President Donald Trump signaled the US was nearing a potential deal with Iran, easing Middle East tensions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Governor’s illness complicates BoJ’s task as landmark 1% rate move looms
top_signals.summary: Kazuo Ueda’s absence will make communication more difficult after next week’s policy board meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chinese Region Pushes Coal Chemicals as Energy Security Fix
top_signals.summary: One of China’s top coal-producing regions plans to expand use of the feedstock to manufacture chemicals, even as the practice poses a rising threat to the country’s climate goals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why worry about the rupee?
top_signals.summary: India’s currency isn’t especially weak and stabilising it has costs as well as benefits

top_signals.title: East Timor president says massive gas project development close to deal
